subcategory: SaaS landing page template with button system
use_cases: Building SaaS landing pages and marketing sites
Creating reusable button components with multiple variants
Developing modern web applications with consistent UI
Implementing accessible button interactions with focus states
ai_summary: A comprehensive SaaS landing page template featuring a multi-variant button component system including default, secondary, ghost, and gradient styles. The component includes hover animations with scale transforms and focus ring accessibility. Designed for modern SaaS applications requiring clean, professional UI components with consistent theming.
